name: Raisin Pie (Rosina Pie, "Funeral Pie")
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the raisins and soak them in cold water for 3 hours. Drain.
2. Combine 2 cups water, the drained raisins, sugar, and flour that have been mixed together with salt, lemon juice, and lemon rind in a large bowl. Add the egg and mix thoroughly.
3. Cook over hot water until it just begins to simmer, stirring occasionally for about 15 minutes.
4. Cool mixture completely.
5. Pour into pastry-lined pan.
6. Cover tightly with narrow strips of dough criss-crossed.
7. Bake at 450°F (230°C) for 10 minutes.
8. Reduce heat to 350°F (180°C) and bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
